projectDescription: A web-based tool that converts photos into string art patterns by algorithmically determining the optimal sequence of pins and threads to recreate an image.
keyFeatures: Upload any photo and convert it to a string art pattern automatically
Configurable number of pins, lines, and line weight for fine-tuning results
Real-time preview showing string art output as it generates
Step-by-step creation assistant to guide physical construction
Saves and restores pin sequences so you don't have to regenerate
Built-in example patterns to try without uploading a photo
Keyboard navigation support (arrow keys / spacebar) during creation mode
OpenCV-powered image processing with grayscale conversion and circle crop
publicApiSurface: Number of Pins (N_PINS) - configurable integer, default 288
Number of Lines (MAX_LINES) - configurable integer, default 4000
example1() / example2() / example3() - built-in example sequences
nextStep() / lastStep() - navigation in creation mode
